comment: Edit: 12/12/23 -- so last time I left a review it was for a bug so bad the app was unusable for weeks but now I'm just annoyed by functional / interface changes .... The inability to pin to multiple boards is now the bane of my existence & takes away SO much for me, like pinning to a shared AND a private board ; also I really miss the hold+drag feature, not only is it basically reflex but it was fun & less boring [altho I get that it could be a mobility friendly change I'm just sad LuL 馃檭]
key sentence: The key words: pin to multiple boards, hold+drag feature
